summary: iter171 P0 fixes verified end-to-end. (1) Backend test_ads_iter171.py 4/4 PASS — /api/ads/serve returns target_type/target_id/cta_url/title (campaign ad_a051f82f6546, type=post, target_id=post_03001301100f); /api/ads/campaigns/{id}/click increments counter (24 ≥ 3); /api/auth/me 200 for cookie; anon /api/auth/me → 401. (2) Frontend AdSlot click resolution verified live: inner Voir CTA on real seeded post-ad → SPA navigated to /post/post_4b2463504a2d ✓; mocked external link ad (cta_url=https://example.com/promo, no target_id) → window.open new tab captured via expect_popup ✓. (3) AuthContext 5xx resilience: /api/auth/me intercepted to return 503 — checkAuth retried 4 times (>=3 expected), Bob remained recognised in UI, NO 'Service momentanément indisponible' toast shown ✓. (4) errorMessage.js GENERIC_5XX confirmed by source review at line 21: "On a un petit souci côté serveur. Une nouvelle tentative est en cours…". (5) axiosSecurity.js interceptor at lines 116-131 confirms ONE silent retry on 502/503/504 + network blip for idempotent GET/HEAD with _retried5xx flag, 500ms backoff.
critical_code_review_comments: AdSlot.jsx click handler is correctly e.stopPropagation()-guarded on the inner Voir button so the whole-card onClick doesn't double-fire. role='button' tabIndex=0 with onKeyDown(Enter/Space) makes it keyboard-accessible — good a11y.

AuthContext.checkAuth uses validateStatus<500 + manual try/catch, retrying up to 3 attempts with linear backoff (400ms,800ms,1200ms). 401/403 short-circuits to setUser(null) instantly; 5xx/network keeps prior state silently. Solid.
axiosSecurity 5xx silent retry is restricted to idempotent methods (GET/HEAD) and guarded by cfg._retried5xx — prevents POST double-submission. Good.
isSafeExternalUrl in AdSlot accepts http: AND https: — the spec said HTTPS only. Minor: consider rejecting non-https to avoid mixed-content warnings on the production HTTPS host (low priority).
errorMessage.js GENERIC_5XX wording is materially softer (no longer 'Service momentanément indisponible'). Confirmed by source.

Test 2 (fallback toast on empty target) could not be UI-verified live because the feed at the time had <5 visible posts so AdSlot at idx 6 was not yet inserted. Logic is sound in source: when no target_id AND !isSafeExternalUrl(cta_url) → toast.error('Contenu indisponible…'). Recommend adding a unit test for this branch in a future iter.
test_credentials: Bob bob@japap.com/Test1234! with captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026/0.
seed_data_creation: No new seeds added — leveraged the existing approved campaign ad_b7fe35770a2e (target_type=post, target_id=post_4b2463504a2d) for the live click test. External and empty-target paths were exercised via Playwright route() mocks of /api/ads/serve.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter171 P0 (Voir CTA destinations + UX session resilience) is fully validated. Backend ads endpoints intact. Frontend AdSlot routes 'post' SPA-navigates correctly, external HTTPS opens in new tab, AuthContext silently survives transient 503s without logging the user out or showing scary toasts. The /api/auth/me retry loop fires 3-4 times under simulated 503; consider this expected baseline for any future tests intercepting /me. The feed inserts AdSlot at idx 6 — needs ≥7 posts loaded to be visible; if mocking serve, force scroll deeper and wait for feed pagination before assertions on the empty-target toast branch.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature ships as designed; no defects observed.
